channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Clicks iPhone keyboard is as powerful as it is frustrating
item.description: A funny thing happened after I stopped using Clicks, the keyboard case that effectively turns an iPhone into an oversized Blackberry: The phone by itself suddenly seemed punier. I mean that in terms of both size and mightiness.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: Everything new on Apple TV Plus in February 2025: The Gorge, Surface season 2, and more
item.description: From new episodes of Severance season 2 to the first Apple Movie Original of the year, here's what's coming to Apple TV Plus in February.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Big Tech on the rise one year after Senate beat-down
item.description: With new dynamics emerging between Silicon Valley and Washington, some advocates for stronger social media regulations and parents are concerned their cause will get lost in the dust despite past momentum.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: How Trump turned the TikTok ban into a political asset
item.description: President Trump has managed to turn a controversial TikTok ban into a political advantage, framing himself as the savior of the popular video-sharing platform by offering the app a 75-day reprieve.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Logan and Jake Paul reveal ‘Paul American’ Max reality show
item.description: It looks like brothers Jake and Logan Paul won’t be squaring off in the boxing ring anytime soon. Instead, they are launching a family reality series, Paul American, starting March 27 on HBO Max.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Texas governor orders ban on DeepSeek, RedNote for government devices
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott issued a ban on Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek for government-issued devices, becoming the first state to restrict the popular chatbot in such a manner.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump vows sweeping tariffs on oil, pharmaceuticals and semiconductors
item.description: President Trump on Friday vowed to impose sweeping tariffs on semiconductor chips, pharmaceuticals, steel and aluminum and oil and gas. "We'll be doing pharmaceuticals. Importantly in drugs and medicines, etc. All forms of medicine and pharmaceuticals," Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: Capital One’s new AI agent will help you buy your next car
item.description: Capital One has launched an AI agent designed to help consumers with one of the most frustrating, time-consuming processes in life: buying a car. The banking giant’s Chat Concierge provides information, makes decisions, and takes action using multiple AI agents.
item.dc:creator: Jocelyn Mintz, Fast Company

item.title: Report: Apple is stopping work on a pair of smart glasses that would have connected to the Mac
item.description: Apple’s reported work on a pair of AR smart glasses that would have connected to a Mac for power has been canceled or shelved this week, according to new reporting from Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Are you problematic? This ‘cancel culture insurance’ could help you deal with social media backlash
item.description: Worried about getting canceled? There’s now insurance policy for that. Insurance agency Samphire Risk is rolling out “cancel culture” insurance for celebrities and execs afraid of social media backlash, according to a report from the Financial Times.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: President Trump to meet with Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang at the White House
item.description: President Donald Trump is meeting Friday with Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, whose company designs and supplies the advanced computer chips that play an integral role in developing artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak, Kevin Freking And Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Amazon Music Unlimited just got a price hike – giving you no reason to choose it over Spotify or Apple Music
item.description: Amazon Music Unlimited is raising prices and having a Prime membership won't save you from the increase. Here are the plans affected and how it compares to Spotify as well as Apple Music.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: A new Chrome browser highjacking attack could affect billions of users - here's how to fight it
item.description: There's a new highjacking attack that could take over your Chrome browser and steal all your data - here's how to keep your computer safe.
item.dc:creator: allisa.james@futurenet.com (Allisa James), TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia unveils preview of DeepSeek-R1 NIM microservice
item.description: Nvidia stock plummeted 17% on Monday after Chinese AI developer, DeepSeek, unveiled its DeepSeek-R1 LLM. On Thursday, the chipmaker turned around and announced the DeepSeek-R1 model is now available as a preview Nvidia inference microservice (NIM) on build.nvidia.com.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Hewlett Packard's $14 Billion Juniper Networks Acquisition Sued by DOJ
item.description: The Department of Justice sues to block Hewlett Packard Enterprise's acquisition of Juniper Networks, citing reduced competition and innovation in the wireless network industry.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: AngelSense Exposed: GPS Tracking Device Company's Database Left Unprotected - Data Leak Concerns
item.description: AngelSense, a company that builds GPS tracking devices for persons with disabilities, left its database exposed and unprotected on the internet, experts warn.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Football lover? You can now win an exclusive Tottenham Hotspur experience when signing up to ExpressVPN
item.description: ExpressVPN kicked off its partnership with the Spurs back in November and this is the first engagement campaign. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: 9 Google Chrome features you really should be using
item.description: If you’re like about 70% of computer users worldwide, you use Google’s Chrome browser as your gateway to the web, from conducting research and catching up on news to emailing and interacting with cloud apps. There are several tools built into Chrome that you might not know about, but should.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cómo DeepSeek cambia la ecuación de la IA generativa para los CIO
item.description: La empresa emergente china de inteligencia artificial (IA) DeepSeek causó sensación la semana pasada cuando dio a conocer una versión de código abierto de su modelo de razonamiento, DeepSeek-R1, que afirma tener un rendimiento superior al modelo generativo preentrenado (GPT) o1 de OpenAI.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: After a week of DeepSeek freakout, doubts and mysteries remain
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: US officials probe China’s DeepSeek AI amid security and privacy scrutiny
item.description: The Chinese AI app DeepSeek has come under intense scrutiny from both the US and European regulators, raising alarms over national security risks, data privacy concerns, and potential intellectual property theft.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 3 exceptional text expansion tools for Windows
item.description: Do you find yourself typing the same things over and over? If the answer is yes — and if you type enough text during the workweek, it almost certainly will be — I’d highly recommend you install a text expansion application.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Federal employee lawsuit alleges security, privacy risks in new OPM communications system
item.description: The plaintiffs claim OPM violated the E-Government Act by not releasing details of how the email system will manage federal employees’ personal information. The post Federal employee lawsuit alleges security, privacy risks in new OPM communications system first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Financial management QSMO growing in use, providers
item.description: Steve Nulter, a senior business analyst in the Quality Service Management Office, said more agencies are using financial management shared services. The post Financial management QSMO growing in use, providers first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Salt Typhoon ignites new federal push for mobile security best practices
item.description: In the wake of the Salt Typhoon hack, agencies are looking to secure their mobile data using encryption and other techniques. The post Salt Typhoon ignites new federal push for mobile security best practices first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: After alarming audit findings, here’s how HHS can overcome cloud security gaps
item.description: The report highlights the possibility of unauthorized access and control over critical systems. The post After alarming audit findings, here’s how HHS can overcome cloud security gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Scammers find sneaky way to bypass your iPhone's safety features
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says cybercriminals are exploiting iMessage phishing protection, tricking users to reactivate links.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sweden seizes vessel suspected of 'sabotage' after undersea data cable rupture in Baltic Sea
item.description: RIGA, Latvia (AP) — Swedish prosecutors announced Sunday night that they have opened a preliminary investigation into suspected aggravated “sabotage” and ordered the detention of a vessel in the Baltic Sea suspected of damaging an underwater fiber optic cable connecting Latvia and the Swedish island
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Biggest Wi-Fi mistakes you can make on a plane
item.description: It's hard to imagine life without in-flight Wi-Fi these days – but sky-high web surfing comes with its own set of privacy concerns. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
